meaning: adj.单独的,唯一的n.脚底,鞋底,基础v.换鞋底
examples: Her sole aim is personal aggrandizement.
My sole reason for coming here was to see you.
The shoe's sole had a slightly textured surface.
First off, I think this presumes kids will use the iPad as their sole computing platform.
Syria will feel even more isolated and embarrassed if its sole solid ally is Iran.
